title: URL Parser

statement.markdown:
## URL Parser

Parse a URL into its components and display them in a user-friendly format.


### Requirements

1. Extract the protocol (http/https) from the URL.

2. Extract the hostname (domain) from the URL.

3. Extract the pathname (path) from the URL.

4. Display the parsed URL components in a UI component, such as a table or list.

constraints: The URL parser should work for both http and https protocols.
The URL parser should correctly extract the hostname from the URL.
The URL parser should correctly extract the pathname from the URL.

starterCode.html:
body:
table: tr: th: ul: li:
  • Pathname:
    • script: div:
    Value

starterCode.javascript: script: // Add your JavaScript code here

judgeConfig.referenceSolution:
import: // Import the URL API

const url: // Create a new URL object

protocol: // Get the protocol from the URL

hostname: // Get the hostname from the URL

pathname: // Get the pathname from the URL

document: // Get the DOM elements

protocolElement: // Set the text content of the protocol element

hostnameElement: // Set the text content of the hostname element

pathnameElement: // Set the text content of the pathname element

table: // Create a table row for the protocol key-value pair

tr: // Create a table row for the hostname and pathname

tableBody: // Append the table rows to the table body
